title: Short title
doc_html:
PART II.  LOUISIANA CONDOMINIUM ACT

SUBPART A.  GENERAL PROVISIONS

§1121.101.  Short title

This Part shall be known as the "Louisiana Condominium Act".  

Acts 1979, No. 682, §1.
